ogTitle: Toiberry vs Tolmans Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Toiberry and Tolmans Hill.
heading: Toiberry vs Tolmans Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Toiberry, Tasmania and Tolmans Hill, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tolmans Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Toiberry (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Toiberry or Tolmans Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Toiberry has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Tolmans Hill scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Toiberry scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Tolmans Hill scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Toiberry or Tolmans Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tolmans Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
